commit.message:
[hat] Improves the testing framework report

This patch improves the report of the testing framework.
When running on accelerators, it could be that some tests
failed, for example, in a call with the GPU driver.

In this case,the current test stops, but also any other test
from the same test-file is not executed. This leads to false
positives when reading the final report, which uses the final
state for each unit-test to update the stats.

This PR fixes this by first exploring all reachable tests
without running. Then, the test-engine runs each individual tests.
At the end, the total number of tests should match the number of
tests lauched. This leads to accurate test-reports.
